# cell-site-atlas FCC tiles

Public GitHub Pages host for the FCC Signal Strength PMTiles used by the (private) [cell-site-atlas](https://github.com/wispiANt/cell-site-atlas) map.

**Do not hand-edit.** Regenerated by `fcc-coverage/publish_tiles_repo.py` in the main repo. Tiles are built from public FCC Broadband Data Collection data; see the main repo's `fcc-coverage/` pipeline and `docs/tile-hosting.md`.

GitHub Pages must be enabled here (deploy from branch, root) so the map can fetch these cross-origin (Pages sends `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *` and supports Range).
